Short TitleFor short title of subtitle S of title III of , which is classified to this part, as the “Family Unity Demonstration Project Act”, see , set out as a Short Title of 1994 Act note under .Pub. L. 103–322section 31901 of Pub. L. 103–322section 10101 of this title

children.text: alleviate the harm to children and primary caretaker parents caused by separation due to the incarceration of the parents;
reduce recidivism rates of prisoners by encouraging strong and supportive family relationships; and
explore the cost effectiveness of community correctional facilities.
